news.title:
ITC Ltd acquired Sproutlife Foods, making it a subsidiary.
The move strengthens ITC's presence in food products via Yoga Bar.
news.summary:
ITC Ltd acquired Sproutlife Foods, making it a subsidiary.
The move strengthens ITC's presence in food products via Yoga Bar.

news.title:
ITC to gain majority board nomination rights in Sproutlife Foods.
Sproutlife Foods will become ITC's subsidiary from April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
ITC to gain majority board nomination rights in Sproutlife Foods.
Sproutlife Foods will become ITC's subsidiary from April 1, 2026.

news.title: ITC Ltd. had an NSE block trade of Rs. 16.6 Cr for 567,029 shares at Rs. 293.1/share.
news.summary: ITC Ltd. had an NSE block trade of Rs. 16.6 Cr for 567,029 shares at Rs. 293.1/share.

news.title:
42 Nifty 50 stocks trade below FY26 analyst targets, highest in a decade.
Trent, TCS, and ITC underperform, while Shriram Finance leads outperformers at 28.7% above target.
news.summary:
42 Nifty 50 stocks trade below FY26 analyst targets, highest in a decade.
Trent, TCS, and ITC underperform, while Shriram Finance leads outperformers at 28.7% above target.

news.title:
UBS rates ITC as 'Buy' with a target of Rs 395, citing stable demand and attractive valuations despite margin pressures.
Goldman Sachs gives ITC a 'Neutral' rating, cutting the target to Rs 330 due to rising costs and limited near-term earnings upside.
news.summary:
UBS rates ITC as 'Buy' with a target of Rs 395, citing stable demand and attractive valuations despite margin pressures.
Goldman Sachs gives ITC a 'Neutral' rating, cutting the target to Rs 330 due to rising costs and limited near-term earnings upside.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.

news.title:
ITC Ltd confirms Blazeclan Americas Inc., a step-down subsidiary, dissolved as of 24th March 2026.
Blazeclan contributed 0.006% to ITC's FY25 income and 0.001% to net worth.
news.summary:
ITC Ltd confirms Blazeclan Americas Inc., a step-down subsidiary, dissolved as of 24th March 2026.
Blazeclan contributed 0.006% to ITC's FY25 income and 0.001% to net worth.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs retains Neutral on ITC, lowers target to Rs 330.
20-40% cigarette price hikes won't offset tax-driven EBIT/stick pressure.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs retains Neutral on ITC, lowers target to Rs 330.
20-40% cigarette price hikes won't offset tax-driven EBIT/stick pressure.

news.title:
UBS rates ITC Limited Buy with a target price of Rs 395.
ITC's pricing strategies to limit NRV decline aim to support strong FY27 EBIT.
news.summary:

news.title:
ITC faces tax hike of 40%, prompting price increases and demand concerns.
Snehi supports Morgan Stanley's viewpoint on ITC's current challenges.
news.summary:
ITC faces tax hike of 40%, prompting price increases and demand concerns.
Snehi supports Morgan Stanley's viewpoint on ITC's current challenges.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley rates ITC Limited Equal-weight with TP of Rs 346 amid tax hike uncertainty.
ITC stock down 25% YTD vs Sensex's 10%. Pricing, volume impact key for Q1 FY27.
news.summary:

news.title:
Morgan Stanley highlights a 40% rise in cigarette tax since February.
The impact on ITC is anticipated starting Q1 FY27.

news.title:
ITC shares fell 2% to ₹298.55, marking a 4.5% March decline and 25.7% YTD drop.
Market cap fell ₹1.3 lakh crore to ₹3.75 lakh crore; cigarette tax hikes weigh on EBIT.
news.summary:
ITC shares fell 2% to ₹298.55, marking a 4.5% March decline and 25.7% YTD drop.
Market cap fell ₹1.3 lakh crore to ₹3.75 lakh crore; cigarette tax hikes weigh on EBIT.

news.title:
Five Nifty 50 stocks hit 52-week lows amid a sell-off, wiping ₹9L cr investor wealth.
HDFC Bank, Cipla, ITC, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and HUL showed significant YTD and 12M declines.
news.summary:
